title: Hellish Nether Portal
description: A more accurate portrayal of the Nether!
body:
![tittle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b75a1208f0d3689ec088576d19c24782e7861bc1.png)


have you ever wondered why the nether portal is purple and cold if the dimension is nothing but te **opposite**? well, let it no longer bother you! with this new subtle recolor you can keep the visual style of the _vanilla_ portal but with a **more accurate representation of the dimension!**


<details>
<summary>Features and Changes</summary>
  
- 🟥 **red** obsidian and crying obsidian
- 🟥 more red and **hellish** portal


</details>


<details>
<summary>COMING SOON</summary>
  
- 🟥 **Biome** reactive portal **Color**
- 🟥 **Red** portal **Particles**
- 🟥 **Enchanting Table Change

</details>
